### Text
Containership MV Mozart has been highjacked, with 15 of the crew kidnapped and one engineering officer an Azerbaijani national killed.
Kidnapper's/Highjackers breached the vessels citadel after 6hrs
Vessel was on route from Lagos to Cape town and happened approx 98nm of Sao Tome
